arts.sum: Lorenzo Lucca, the rising star of Italian football, has become the center of attention for several top clubs in Serie A. After fending off interest during the January transfer window, Udinese has made it clear they are open to negotiations for their prized striker come the end of the season. arts.sum: AS Roma travel to take on FC Porto in the Europa League’s play-off round this evening. The two teams started the season among the favourites for success in this competition but missed out on automatic qualification to the Round of 16. arts.sum: Porto manager Martin Anselmi is expected to maintain his preferred back-three system as his team prepares to face Roma in the first leg of their Europa League playoff.
